notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: Ebola is spreading faster in eastern Congo than it can be tracked, as deaths pass 700
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 世界卫生组织称，刚果（金）东部80%的新增埃博拉病例来自未知传播链，表明疫情传播速度已超出卫生官员的追踪能力。
articles.summary: 文章报道了刚果（金）东部埃博拉疫情的最新严峻形势：死亡人数已超过700人，且80%的新病例来自未知传播链，意味着疫情正在失控扩散。这凸显了当地公共卫生系统应对能力的不足，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：疫情传播速度超过追踪能力，导致防控措施难以有效实施。这提醒我们，在应对突发公共卫生事件时，快速建立监测和响应机制至关重要。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.

zh.title: 刚果（金）东部埃博拉疫情失控，死亡人数超700
zh.highlight: 世界卫生组织称，刚果（金）东部80%的新增埃博拉病例来自未知传播链，表明疫情传播速度已超出卫生官员的追踪能力。
zh.summary: 文章报道了刚果（金）东部埃博拉疫情的最新严峻形势：死亡人数已超过700人，且80%的新病例来自未知传播链，意味着疫情正在失控扩散。这凸显了当地公共卫生系统应对能力的不足，值得关注。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：疫情传播速度超过追踪能力，导致防控措施难以有效实施。这提醒我们，在应对突发公共卫生事件时，快速建立监测和响应机制至关重要。

en.highlight: Eighty percent of new Ebola cases in eastern Congo are emerging from unknown chains of transmission, according to WHO, a sign the outbreak is spreading faster than health officials can track.
en.summary: The article reports that the Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo is worsening, with over 700 deaths and 80% of new cases from unknown transmission chains, indicating the outbreak is outpacing containment efforts. It highlights critical gaps in public health response.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: The outbreak is spreading faster than tracking capabilities, undermining control measures. This underscores the need for rapid surveillance and response systems in health emergencies.
en.title: Ebola spreading faster than trackable in eastern Congo, deaths pass 700

articles.title: Killings continue on Del Monte farm in Kenya, families say, after G4S hired for security
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 尽管德尔蒙特公司聘请英国安保公司G4S取代内部安保团队，其肯尼亚菠萝农场上仍持续发生杀人事件。
articles.summary: 本文揭露了德尔蒙特公司在肯尼亚的菠萝农场尽管更换了安保公司，但暴力事件仍在继续。此前《卫报》曝光了该农场安保人员涉嫌非法侵入者遭殴打和杀害的指控。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：即使更换为国际安保公司，若土地纠纷和执法合作问题未解决，暴力事件仍可能持续。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Exclusive: Three men killed in incidents over past year allegedly involving G4S guards, who replaced in-house team after previous deaths Bereaved families and politicians have raised alarm about continued killings on Del Monte’s pineapple farm in Kenya despite the company hiring a British security firm to replace its in-house security team after previous deaths were exposed by the Guardian. The multinational food company appointed G4S to guard the farm, which is estimated to cover at least 40 sq km, the area of a small city, after the Guardian detailed allegations of brutal assaults and killings of people suspected of trespassing on its land. Kenyan police have been working with G4S to guard the site.

zh.title: 肯尼亚德尔蒙特大农场持续发生命案，英安保公司G4S接手后仍未能阻止
zh.highlight: 尽管德尔蒙特公司聘请英国安保公司G4S取代内部安保团队，其肯尼亚菠萝农场上仍持续发生杀人事件。
zh.summary: 本文揭露了德尔蒙特公司在肯尼亚的菠萝农场尽管更换了安保公司，但暴力事件仍在继续。此前《卫报》曝光了该农场安保人员涉嫌非法侵入者遭殴打和杀害的指控。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键启示：即使更换为国际安保公司，若土地纠纷和执法合作问题未解决，暴力事件仍可能持续。

en.highlight: Despite Del Monte hiring British security firm G4S to replace its in-house team, killings continue on its pineapple farm in Kenya.
en.summary: This article reveals that violence persists on Del Monte's pineapple farm in Kenya despite a change in security contractor. The Guardian previously exposed allegations of brutal assaults and killings by the farm's security personnel against suspected trespassers.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Even with an international security firm, violence may continue if underlying land disputes and law enforcement collaboration are not addressed.
en.title: Killings continue on Del Monte farm in Kenya, families say, after G4S hired for security

articles.title: Nigeria says army has killed 300 bandits in north-western state of Zamfara
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 尼日利亚军方在扎姆法拉州古米地区的两天行动中“消灭了300多名恐怖分子”。
articles.summary: 尼日利亚军方在西北部扎姆法拉州展开行动，击毙了300多名绑架和偷牛团伙成员。当地居民称，治安维持会成员也参与了这场持续整夜及次日上午的战斗。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该报道展示了尼日利亚政府打击土匪的力度，但未提及行动对平民的影响或长期安全策略。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Vigilantes also took part in the fight that raged all night and the following morning, residents say Nigerian soldiers killed more than 300 members of kidnapping and cattle bandit gangs in the north-western state of Zamfara this week, according to a government official. Government troops targeted the gangs in Gummi district in a two-day operation that “led to the elimination of more than 300 terrorists”, Zamfara’s information commissioner, Mahmud Muhammad Dantawasa, said in a statement.

zh.title: 尼日利亚军方在扎姆法拉州击毙300名土匪
zh.highlight: 尼日利亚军方在扎姆法拉州古米地区的两天行动中“消灭了300多名恐怖分子”。
zh.summary: 尼日利亚军方在西北部扎姆法拉州展开行动，击毙了300多名绑架和偷牛团伙成员。当地居民称，治安维持会成员也参与了这场持续整夜及次日上午的战斗。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该报道展示了尼日利亚政府打击土匪的力度，但未提及行动对平民的影响或长期安全策略。

en.highlight: Nigerian soldiers killed more than 300 members of kidnapping and cattle bandit gangs in the north-western state of Zamfara this week.
en.summary: Nigerian troops killed over 300 bandits in a two-day operation in Zamfara state. Vigilantes also participated in the fight that raged all night and the following morning.
en.failureAnalysis: The report highlights the government's crackdown on banditry but does not address civilian impact or long-term security strategy.
en.title: Nigeria says army has killed 300 bandits in north-western state of Zamfara

articles.title: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提供循环工程的实用模式、入门工具和CLI工具，帮助开发者使用AI编码代理构建系统。它包含循环审计、循环初始化和循环成本等工具，旨在简化代理编排流程。值得阅读因为它展示了如何在实际工程中应用AI代理模式。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因过度依赖特定AI代理框架而缺乏通用性，导致用户迁移成本高。此外，CLI工具和模式需要持续维护以适配快速变化的AI模型，若社区贡献不足可能停滞。最后，实际部署中代理的可靠性和成本控制仍是挑战。
articles.highlight: 设计系统来提示和编排代理，灵感来自Addy Osmani和Boris Cherny。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 7871 stars and recent public activity. Description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny).

zh.title: 循环工程：AI编码代理的实用模式与CLI工具
zh.highlight: 设计系统来提示和编排代理，灵感来自Addy Osmani和Boris Cherny。
zh.summary: 该项目提供循环工程的实用模式、入门工具和CLI工具，帮助开发者使用AI编码代理构建系统。它包含循环审计、循环初始化和循环成本等工具，旨在简化代理编排流程。值得阅读因为它展示了如何在实际工程中应用AI代理模式。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目可能因过度依赖特定AI代理框架而缺乏通用性，导致用户迁移成本高。此外，CLI工具和模式需要持续维护以适配快速变化的AI模型，若社区贡献不足可能停滞。最后，实际部署中代理的可靠性和成本控制仍是挑战。

en.highlight: Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents, inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny.
en.summary: This repository provides practical patterns, starters, and CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents, including loop-audit, loop-init, and loop-cost. It is worth reading because it demonstrates how to apply AI agent patterns in real engineering.
en.failureAnalysis: The project may fail due to lack of generality, high migration costs, and the need for continuous maintenance to keep up with rapidly evolving AI models. Deployment reliability and cost control remain challenges.
en.title: Loop Engineering: Practical Patterns & CLI Tools for AI Coding Agents

articles.title: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic ai; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 ai 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。
paperCard.method: 解决方式：基于完整可读内容，概括它用什么模型、材料或系统流程解决问题。
paperCard.difference: 不同之处：重点看它是否比旧方法更稳定、更便宜、更准确或更容易部署。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点：把技术改进和真实应用目标连接起来，而不是只停留在理论指标。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现：先看输入数据，再看核心模型或装置，最后看实验验证结果。
paperCard.applications: 应用途径：优先关注医疗辅助、工业系统、智能硬件、能源设备等可落地方向。
technicalTerms: 关键技术词：保留原论文术语，并用白话解释其作用。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic ai; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

articles.highlight: 本文探讨了利用基础模型自动生成计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型的方法。
articles.summary: 该论文提出利用基础模型实现CAD模型的自动生成，旨在提高设计效率。研究可能涉及深度学习技术，对工程设计自动化有潜在价值。
articles.failureAnalysis: 由于仅提供摘要，缺乏具体方法、实验和结果细节，无法评估其技术可行性和实际效果。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation J. de Curt` o1,2, Victoria Guill´ en2,3 and I. de Zarz` a4 1 Department of Computer Applications in Science & Engineering, BARCELONA Supercomputing Center, 08034 Barcelona, Spain 2 Escuela T´ ecnica Superior de Ingenier´ ıa (ICAI), Universidad Pontificia Comillas, 28015 Madrid, Spain 3 Department of Artificial Intelligence, Chung-Ang University, Seoul, Republic of Korea 4 Human Centered AI, Data & Software, LUXEMBOURG Institute of Science and Technology, L-4362 Esch-sur-Alzette, Luxembourg Abstract.Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have opened new pathways for the automatic generation of parametric three-dimensional designs from natural-language specifications.

en.title: Foundation Models for Automatic CAD Generation
en.highlight: This paper explores methods for automatically generating computer-aided design (CAD) models using foundation models.
en.summary: The paper proposes using foundation models to automatically generate CAD models, aiming to improve design efficiency. The research may involve deep learning techniques and has potential value for engineering design automation.
en.failureAnalysis: As only the abstract is provided, lacking specific methods, experiments, and results, it is impossible to assess technical feasibility and practical effectiveness.

paperCard.problem: Problem: use the paper card to identify the practical problem before judging the technique.
paperCard.method: Method: read the model, material, device, or system workflow as the proposed solution.
paperCard.difference: Difference: compare whether it is more stable, cheaper, more accurate, or easier to deploy than older methods.
paperCard.innovation: Innovation: focus on the link between the technical change and a real application goal.
paperCard.implementation: Implementation: check the input data, core model or device, and validation results.
paperCard.applications: Applications: look for realistic use in healthcare, industrial systems, smart hardware, or energy devices.
technicalTerms: 关键技术词：保留原论文术语，并用白话解释其作用。

articles.title: WenyuChiou/awesome-agentic-ai-zh
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目是一个面向中文开发者的 AI Agent 学习路线图，从 LLM 基础到多智能体系统，提供了 240 多个精选资源和动手实例。它适合希望系统学习 Agent 构建的开发者，尤其是需要中文资料的学习者。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目作为学习资源，本身不直接解决商业问题，可能因内容更新不及时或缺乏深度实践指导而价值有限。此外，AI Agent 领域发展迅速，路线图可能很快过时，需要持续维护。
articles.highlight: 三语（繁中/英文/简中）AI agent 学习路线图，包含 240+ 精选资源和动手实例。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 4528 stars and recent public activity. Description: A trilingual (繁中 / English / 简中) learning roadmap for agentic AI: from LLM basics to multi-agent systems, with 240+ curated resources and hands-on examples.

zh.title: AI Agent 学习路线图：从 LLM 基础到多智能体系统
zh.highlight: 三语（繁中/英文/简中）AI agent 学习路线图，包含 240+ 精选资源和动手实例。
zh.summary: 该项目是一个面向中文开发者的 AI Agent 学习路线图，从 LLM 基础到多智能体系统，提供了 240 多个精选资源和动手实例。它适合希望系统学习 Agent 构建的开发者，尤其是需要中文资料的学习者。
zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目作为学习资源，本身不直接解决商业问题，可能因内容更新不及时或缺乏深度实践指导而价值有限。此外，AI Agent 领域发展迅速，路线图可能很快过时，需要持续维护。

en.highlight: A trilingual (Traditional Chinese/English/Simplified Chinese) learning roadmap for agentic AI with 240+ curated resources and hands-on examples.
en.summary: This project provides a learning roadmap for AI agents, covering from LLM basics to multi-agent systems, with over 240 curated resources and hands-on examples. It is valuable for Chinese-speaking developers who want to systematically learn agent building.
en.failureAnalysis: As a learning resource, it does not directly solve business problems and may become outdated quickly due to the fast pace of AI agent development. Continuous maintenance is required to remain relevant.
en.title: AI Agent Learning Roadmap: From LLM Basics to Multi-Agent Systems
